inputs.user_input: Draft and send an email to all students reminding them that the Software Testing quiz covering Unit Testing and Black Box Testing is next Monday at 9am. Include what topics to study and how to prepare.

output:
✓ Email approved and sent to students.

SUBJECT: Software Testing Quiz Reminder: Unit Testing & Black Box Testing - Next Monday

BODY:
Dear Students,

This email serves as a reminder regarding the upcoming quiz for the Software Testing course.

The quiz will be held next Monday, [Insert Date of next Monday], at 9:00 AM. It will cover the topics of Unit Testing and Black Box Testing.

To prepare effectively, please focus your studies on the following areas:

*   **Unit Testing:** Review all lecture materials, readings, and examples related to Unit Testing, including its principles, methodologies, and importance in software development.
*   **Black Box Testing:** Concentrate on the concepts and techniques of Black Box Testing, understanding how it focuses on the input, output, and principle function of a software module without knowledge of its internal structure. Familiarize yourselves with different Black Box Testing approaches.

I advise you to:
*   Thoroughly review your lecture notes and assigned readings for both topics.
*   Ensure a comprehensive understanding of the core concepts rather than memorization.
*   Consider discussing the material with your peers to reinforce your learning.
*   Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions prior to the quiz.

I wish you all the best in your preparation.

Sincerely,

[Lecturer's Name]
[Department Name, e.g., School of Information Technology]
Mae Fah Luang University
